PROJECT_SCOPE.location: runtime:gcloud run services list, runtime:gcloud secrets list, runtime:firebase-admin firestore listCollections

AUDIT_RECONSTRUCTION_MAP.trace: traceId seeded from webhook payload and reused as requestId
traceId persisted in notification flow and audit timeline
delivery rows preserve trace for retries and analytics
source evidence stored with trace and recoverable by trace query
llm action log normalizes traceId for replay

PROJECT_FAILURE_RECOVERY_MAP.recovery: fail_closed validator response and reject write before persistence
admin/internal token guards stop route execution
kill switch gate blocks send and job execution until flag reset
error classification + retry queue + source audit status downgrade
retryQueuedSend give-up path marks queue item with terminal state
deliveryBackfillAdmin checks plan hash and refuses unsafe replay

PROJECT_INFRA_MAP.dependency: HTTP fetch to sourceRef.url in City Pack source audit
infra web search adapter for citation source normalization
